creator: markd@grizzly.com
text:
The "cu" program included is a link to "tip".  They Taylor (GNU) uucp
program is much more useful, as it uses the UUCP system and modem
configuration files.  Tip is fairly useless, as you can't do any modem
configuration.

Fix: 

Replace the "cu" link to tip with the Taylor "cu" program.  Update the tip
manual page and include the Taylor manual page.
